# DOMINASE — Digital Product Studio

> Site: https://www.dominase.art
> Founded by: Mohammed Aldomi
> Location: Amman, Jordan

## What DOMINASE Is

DOMINASE is a digital product studio that builds websites, digital systems, dashboards, booking flows, CRM and follow-up workflows, and product interfaces for businesses. The studio focuses on clarity, trust, conversion, and operational depth — not generic templates.

## Services

- Websites that explain the offer with strong hierarchy and storytelling
- Product and dashboard interfaces for admins, teams, and customers
- Booking, form, and workflow paths (requests, RSVPs, surveys, onboarding, follow-up)
- Strategic business diagnosis (free self-assessment tool)
- Bilingual (English / Arabic) digital experiences

## Public Routes

- / — Home page. Overview of DOMINASE, services, selected work, and testimonials.
- /work — Selected digital product case studies and portfolio.
- /diagnosis — Free strategic growth diagnosis tool for businesses.
- /diagnosis/clinic — Clinic-specific diagnosis: website, booking, patient trust, follow-up.
- /diagnosis/venue — Wedding venue diagnosis: availability, gallery, RSVP, follow-up.
- /diagnosis/engineering — Engineering company diagnosis: portfolio, quotes, proposals.
- /diagnosis/general-business — General service business growth diagnosis.
- /why-change — Why standing still digitally costs clarity, trust, and conversion.
- /why-us — Why DOMINASE builds custom systems, not generic templates.
- /contact — Start a project conversation via WhatsApp, phone, email, or contact form.

## Diagnosis Tool

The DOMINASE Growth Diagnosis is a free, web-based strategic self-assessment. It evaluates businesses across clarity, trust, conversion, follow-up, and digital readiness. It is not medical, legal, or financial advice. It provides strategic guidance only.

## Guardrails

- DOMINASE does not guarantee specific business outcomes or rankings.
- The diagnosis tool is a strategic self-assessment, not professional advice.
- Testimonials on the site are from real project partners.
- No fake reviews, stats, locations, or claims exist on this site.
